_comment: Battle AI phase 2 subcommander demo (#585): mutual support. No scenario override at all -- the standard 5v5 default line spawn (seed 12345), not copied from any other PR's scripted-input file (see .claude/memories/sparta-demos.md's 'author each demo scenario fresh' entry -- an empty scenario override isn't a borrowed template, it's the same starting point test_battle_ai_leaders.gd's own phase-1 tests already use). Nothing needs staging: Subcommander.decide_group's mutual-support behaviour is verified (tools/demo/dump-state.sh) to fire on its own as the enemy (team 1) line closes on the stationary player line -- by tick ~480 the right-flank Cavalry unit (uid 8) drops its own ATTACK order for a bare MOVE with no target (a subcommander directive taking over its UnitLeader fallback branch), then by tick ~540 that resolves into a real SUPPORT order guarding its engaged neighbor (Archers, uid 7) -- current_order reading SUPPORT is a phase-2-only signature, since phase 1's own repertoire (face-flank-threat / form-square / call-for-relief / advance-attack) never issues one. Camera opens on a wide establishing view of both lines, eases into the right flank where the behaviour plays out, and holds there through the clip's end. Verified by state dump: current_order reads SUPPORT for a team-1 unit by tick 600.
